entities.name: COVERAGE-BASED CONSENSUS CALLING (CBCC)
entities.description: A method for calling consensus sequences from short sequence reads to identify SNPs in species without a reference genome.

entities.name: SHORT SEQUENCE READS
entities.description: Short fragments of DNA sequences generated by high-throughput sequencing technologies.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as genetic markers for identification and analysis.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A crop species (Cicer Arietinum) that lacks a reference genome.

entities.name: REFERENCE GENOME
entities.description: A representative genome sequence of a species used as a standard for comparison in genomic studies.

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism, applied to human health and agriculture.

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT SEQUENCING
entities.description: Sequencing methods capable of generating large amounts of data rapidly and at a relatively low cost.

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION SEQUENCING (NGS)
entities.description: A set of high-throughput DNA sequencing technologies developed over the last decade.
